items.summary: Add a clearly visible 'Position Holes' button directly on or immediately below the OcarinaVisual play-along component in the main App layout, so users can access hole positioning without navigating into the Settings modal.

When the 'Position Holes' button is clicked, open the HolePositioningEditor component as a modal or inline overlay directly on the OcarinaVisual component, so the user can drag and reposition each of the 4 holes (left index, left middle, right index, right middle) on the current ocarina background (stock photo or uploaded photo) without leaving the main view.

Ensure the HolePositioningEditor opened from the OcarinaVisual context uses the stock grey ocarina image as the background by default when no user photo has been uploaded, matching the background currently displayed by OcarinaVisual, so the user can visually align holes to the actual image.
